parameters.content:
GIT-Committer multi-agent PR review (Track-3)

POST {"diff":"<unified diff>"} to /webhook/git-committer-review.
3 role reviewers (qwen3-coder, parallel) -> negotiation (qwen-plus) -> one verdict, plus a single-agent baseline metric (the Track-3 story).
Needs: DASHSCOPE_* + QWEN_CODER_MODEL/QWEN_CHAT_MODEL env.
